---
id: get-webview-linked-vrm
title: "Get the linked VRM for a webview"
description: "Retrieve the VRM entity that is linked to this webview, if any."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the linked VRM for a webview"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/webviews/{entity_id}/linked-vrm"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve the VRM entity that is linked to this webview, if any.
